creator: olgeni@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

It only seems to happen on 9.3 (I first noticed it in poudriere)

https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140813152701-50411/

The only difference I could see is that 9.3 has this line in the configure log:

"checking whether cc supports -Wvla... yes"

while 9.2 has:

"checking whether cc supports -Wvla... no"
